This [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] '''red-haired Jedi''' was a member of the [[Army of Light/Legends|Army of Light]] in the [[Ruusan campaign]] in [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]]. He fought alongside [[Kiel Charny]] in a battle on Ruusan. After the fight, he witnessed a [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|duel]] between [[Githany]] and Charny, and then watched as [[Darovit]] [[Death/Legends|murdered]] Charny and defected to the [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Sith]]. It was likely he who informed the Army of Light of Darovit's treachery.<ref name="JvS 4" />

When [[Jedi Lord|Lord]] [[Hoth (Jedi Lord)|Hoth]] began planning an [[Seventh Battle of Ruusan|assault]] on [[Skere Kaan|Kaan]] in his [[Cave/Legends|cave]] stronghold, the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] was convinced he had gone mad, and was rebuked by his companion [[Petja]] for [[Treason/Legends|treasonous]] speech. The Jedi later helped Petja aim as he shot down [[Bouncer]]s, many of whom had gone insane with the massive destruction of the battle and were spreading panic and fear throughout the army. When they killed [[Laa (Bouncer)|Laa]], a Bouncer who had befriended [[Darth Zannah/Legends|Rain]], she used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] in anger to snap the necks of the two men.<ref name="JvS 5" />

==Behind the scenes==
This Jedi's appearance was based on inker [[Raul Fernandez]].<ref name="JediNet">{{WebCite|url=http://jedinet.com/news/ArchiveDisplay.asp?fldr=Books+and+Comics&month=August&year=2001|text=Books and Comics Archives for August 2001|author=SithAvenger|date=2001-08-27|work=JediNet.com|archivedate=20051129001658}}</ref>
